name: xero-blade-mcp
title: Xero
description: Xero Accounting + Payroll AU API operations — contacts, invoices, bills, payments, reports, payroll. Token-efficient, write-gated, confirm-gated for destructive ops.
author: groupthink-dev
tagline: Xero accounting and AU payroll in your AI workflow

highlights.text: Invoices — create, send, void, and track payment status
Bills — accounts payable with line items and due dates
Contacts — customers and suppliers with full address book
Reports — P&L, balance sheet, trial balance, aged receivables
Payments — record and reconcile against invoices and bills
Write-gated — all mutations behind explicit confirm flag

readme:
### What it does

Xero gives your AI agent full access to Xero Accounting and Payroll AU APIs. Manage contacts, create and send invoices, track bills, record payments, and pull financial reports — all from conversation.

Your agent can check outstanding invoices, create a bill for a new supplier, pull this month’s P&L, or reconcile a payment — without switching to the Xero dashboard.

### Token efficiency

Xero API responses include extensive pagination metadata, tracking categories, and internal reference fields. Each tool strips these down to the essential fields — a typical invoice list returns ~40% fewer tokens than raw API output.

### Safety model

All tools follow a read-free, write-gated, confirm-gated pattern:

- **Reads** work immediately — list contacts, view invoices, pull reports
- **Writes** require explicit confirmation — create invoices, record payments
- **Destructive operations** are double-gated — voiding invoices, deleting contacts

### Contract coverage

Full 39/39 accounting-v1 contract compliance across transactions, contacts, settings, and reports. Includes Australian Payroll (pay runs, employees, leave, super) when Payroll AU scope is granted.

scenarios.label: End-of-month accounts review
scenarios.body: Pull the P&L and balance sheet reports, check aged receivables for overdue invoices, and review recent payments against outstanding bills.

scenarios.label: Invoice a new client
scenarios.body: Create or look up the contact, create a draft invoice with line items, review it for accuracy, then approve and send via Xero.

scenarios.label: Reconcile supplier payments
scenarios.body: List unpaid bills for a supplier, match them against recent bank transactions, record payments, and verify the supplier’s account balance is zero.

env.name: XERO_CLIENT_ID
env.description: OAuth2 client ID from Xero Developer Portal

setup.help_text: Create an app at developer.xero.com → My Apps → New App. Select 'Web app' type with client_credentials grant. Copy the client ID and secret, then find your tenant ID via the Xero API connections endpoint.
prerequisites: Xero app with client_credentials grant type
